communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am resubmitting this request to obtain the most current versions of the requested records and to determine whether any changes have occurred since my prior request. 

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act (O.C.G.A. § 50-18-70 et seq.), I request the following records related to the department’s Flock Safety system, current as of the date this request is fulfilled: 

Records related to the department’s Flock Safety system: 
1. A list of network share settings that include: 
1a. Flock networks shared with me 
1b. Networks that I’m sharing 

Please provide these records in their original electronic, machine-readable format (e.g., CSV or spreadsheet files where applicable).

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jason Hunyar

title: Open Records Request – Internal Communications Regarding Flock Employee Camera Access

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All emails, text messages, direct messages, memoranda, notes, or written communications of any kind related to Flock Safety employees, contractors, or representatives accessing, viewing, or monitoring live view cameras or recorded footage through Dunwoody's Flock Safety network, from January 1, 2025 through the date this request is received.

This request includes but is not limited to:

Any communications in which Flock employee camera access was discussed, flagged, reported, or reviewed
Any communications regarding the Marcus Jewish Community Center (MJCCA/JCC) cameras specifically, including but not limited to access by Flock employees or representatives
Any communications regarding the "Do Not Share" designation on any camera network and any override, modification, or discussion of that designation
Any communications in which Flock employee access was raised as a concern internally or with Flock representatives
Any communications between any Dunwoody city official or employee and Flock Safety regarding employee access permissions, administrative actions, or system access logs

This request includes communications to or from the following individuals at minimum:

Chief of Police Mike Carlson
Major Patrick Krieg
Technology Director Ginger LePage
City Manager Eric Linton
Any member of the Dunwoody City Council

Please provide all responsive records in their original electronic, machine-readable format, including full metadata, headers, and any attachments.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jason Hunyar

title: Open Records Request – PD Communications with Flock Safety

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All emails, text messages, direct messages, or written communications of any kind between Mike Carlson and any employee, representative, agent, or contractor of Flock Safety, from January 1, 2025 through the date this request is received.

Please provide all responsive records in their original electronic, machine-readable format, including full metadata, headers, and any attachments.

Please do not redirect me to a transparency portal or dashboard in lieu of producing the underlying records. This request is made for non-commercial purposes, and the responsive records will be made available to the general public. If any portion of the requested records is withheld or redacted, please cite the specific statutory exemption relied upon. If there are any anticipated costs, please notify me in advance.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jason Hunyar
